introSection: Heiße Fahrt is a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Wild- und Freizeitpark Klotten/Cochem in Klotten, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On 6 August 2022, a 57-year-old was thrown from the ride to her death. The park was closed for the following two days. The ride reopened on 9 August 2022.

fullText:
Heiße Fahrt is a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Wild- und Freizeitpark Klotten/Cochem in Klotten, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.





On 6 August 2022, a 57-year-old was thrown from the ride to her death. The park was closed for the following two days. The ride reopened on 9 August 2022.
